course_title: PRINTED AND FLEXIBLE ELECTRONICS: MANUFACTURING, DEVICES, AND APPLICATIONS
description: Exploration of additive fabrication of thin-film electronics. Various techniques, materials, and applications of printable electronics with a key focus on mechanically flexible electronic devices. Identify the appropriate printing technology and materials to achieve desired device performance.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 230or376, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 230or376, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
